title: Which scene had your heart racing faster
display_title: Which scene had your heart racing faster
wikitext:
[]: Which scene had your heart racing faster?             Quote Post by MisatoCrush » Sat Jan 18, 2014 1:37 am When Shinji falls on top of a naked Rei? When Asuka kisses Shinji? Or when Misato kisses Shinji? My vote is definitely when Asuka kisses Shinji. "Then, here I come." woooohhh momma. Ahh, to be young once again!

[]:             Quote Post by Lord ikari shinji » Sat Jan 18, 2014 1:57 am this thread. For the sake of posting: i vote the shinasuka scene, i mean those two needed to get a room.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Sat Jan 18, 2014 3:47 am ^ I'm going to second that. Hey, I'm sure you all knew what I was gonna say the moment this thread appeared.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoCrush » Sat Jan 18, 2014 4:10 am Yes! Very nice avatar pic Bardiel!

[]:             Quote Post by Gorbatschow » Sat Jan 18, 2014 6:26 am I could take the easy way out and say End of Evangelion (I actually cried the first three times I saw the movie ), but I'll go with a tie between Kaworu's Death and EVA-01 killing EVA-03 . I like the shinasuka scene, because of the character development, the knowledge we gain about Shinji and Asuka because of this scene and the relevance to Shinji's and Asuka's relationship, but since I'm not really a shipper of any kind, it's not really a scene that makes my heart racing faster.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 18, 2014 7:30 am I'm not a shipper, either, so the scene that had my heart racing fastest was probably the end of episode 19. Most awesome shit ever .

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Jan 18, 2014 12:07 pm Reichu wrote: I'm not a shipper, either, so the scene that had my heart racing fastest was probably the end of episode 19. Most awesome shit ever .

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jan 18, 2014 5:27 pm Thirded. ep19 was a crowning moment of badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Sat Jan 18, 2014 5:50 pm I have to fourth that. Episode 19 still remains my favorite episode for that very reason. And "THE BEAST II" is my favorite track from the series for the same reason. (In terms of the choices presented in the first post, though, probably the one with Rei, because 15-year-old me used to grin stupidly at hand-on-boob kind of shenanigans. Thankfully, EVA was one of those things that helped me grow beyond 15-year-old me.)

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Jan 18, 2014 7:29 pm NGE = Kaworu Vs. Shinji EoE = Whole second half NME = From the moment the 4th impact starts and beyond.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoCrush » Sat Jan 18, 2014 7:49 pm Giji Shinka wrote: NME = From the moment the 4th impact starts and beyond.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 18, 2014 7:50 pm NME = New Movie Edition. NTE (New Theatrical Edition) is probably preferable, but both get used. NGE is Neon Genesis Evangelion, i.e. the original series. In Britain, NME is also New Musical Express

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 18, 2014 10:06 pm pwhodges wrote: NME = New Movie Edition. NTE (New Theatrical Edition) is probably preferable, but both get used.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sat Jan 18, 2014 10:10 pm I'm gonna have to say the end of episode 19, nothing beats the awakening of Unit-01. That being said 2.0 ruined it with Shinji acting retarded, the gar feeling surrounding the scene, and the music which instead of making it uneasy made it cheesy.

[]: Re: Which scene had your heart racing faster?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jan 20, 2014 8:05 pm MisatoCrush wrote: When Shinji falls on top of a naked Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Jan 20, 2014 8:13 pm The finales of episode 18 and 19 are both pants-shittingly intense. After 18, I wanted to throw something at the TV. After 19, I wanted to pump my fist in the air.

[]: Re: Which scene had your heart racing faster?             Quote Post by MisatoCrush » Mon Jan 20, 2014 8:30 pm Kendrix wrote: If we're not talking strictly shipping moments, but all moments, then I say the whole yaking around of your feels that is episode 23. Did they seriously kill her off in five min? Is she alive after all, or isn't she? etc. The whole Asuka punch is a lite version of the same painful effect. He's just so damn happy... actually, most of Q qualifies to some degree.

[]:             Quote Post by EVAfacepalm » Mon Jan 20, 2014 11:19 pm None of them. I generally side with Shinji and Asuka shipping when I think about shipping, but when watching the show in serious mode I am firmly on the nomance interpretation. All of those scenes when interpreted seriously, point to emotional, let alone romantic, connections being impossible for Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Stratomeister » Sat Jan 25, 2014 11:47 pm Between those three, well is there even any room for discussion? Asuka kissing Shinji, dur! As for the series as a whole, eh~ it's kind of a major toss up between a few pivotal scenes. 1) Episode 16, when Eva-01 goes berserk and breaks free from the Leliel's grasp. The moment the ground shatters and "The Beast II" begins to play, wah~, it just sends shivers down my spine. And if I;m recalling correctly, this is the first time that track is played, and is it ever put to good use! The track is played so loudly (excessively almost), that it's even distorted at times. 2) Episode 19, when Eva-01 goes berserk yet again and devours Zeruel. I personally consider this the turning point of the series, and yet again, another moment where "The Best II" is used to it's maximum potential. 3) Episode 23, when Ritsuko reveals the truth behind the Eva, and shows Shinji and Misato the empty vessels that are used to contain Rei's soul. At this point I was like "Whoooooooooah, okay what the hell is going on here!" Between those three, I believe that I have enough material to waste away many hours trying to figure out what exactly was going through Anno's head to be able to come up with something like this.

[]: Re: Which scene had your heart racing faster?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jan 26, 2014 7:28 am MisatoCrush wrote: What do you mean here in bold? I don't understand.

Or when Misato kisses Shinji? My vote is definitely when Asuka kisses Shinji. "Then, here I come." woooohhh momma. Ahh, to be young once again!

Article: Which scene had your heart racing faster
 it's kind of a major toss up between a few pivotal scenes. 1) Episode 16, when Eva-01 goes berserk and breaks free from the Leliel's grasp. The moment the ground shatters and "The Beast II" begins to play, wah~, it just sends shivers down my spine. And if I;m recalling correctly, this is the first time that track is played, and is it ever put to good use! The track is played so loudly (excessively almost), that it's even distorted at times. 2) Episode 19, when Eva-01 goes berserk yet again and devours Zeruel. I personally consider this the turning point of the series, and yet again, another moment where "The Best II" is used to it's maximum potential. 3) Episode 23, when Ritsuko reveals the truth behind the Eva, and shows Shinji and Misato the empty vessels that are used to contain Rei's soul. At this point I was like "Whoooooooooah, okay what the hell is going on here!" Between those three, I believe that I have enough material to waste away many hours trying to figure out what exactly was going through Anno's head to be able to come up with something like this.
